calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For An Order 1) Modifying The Receivership Order; And 2) Authorizing Court-Appointed Receiver To Sell Property Located At 54 4th Street, San Francisco, California 94103
Off Calendar May-18-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances
Mia Blackler, Esq. for Plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A.
Matthew Gluck, Esq. for Defendant Mosser Victorian Hotel of Arts and Music, Inc. and Neveo Mosser.
Dennis Gemberling, receiver.

Plaintiff presents to the court a stipulated order for execution.
No objections made.

Good cause appearing, the court vacates the tentative ruling.

The court signs and executes the proposed stipulated order.

Visiting Judge: Dennis Hayashi; Clerk: K.Valdes; Not Reported. (D501)
